prompt: Convert this radiology passage into Anki cloze flashcards. Prioritize imaging features, unique findings, and differentiating similar entities.

assertions.name: word_count_under_40
assertions.description: Each card must be under 40 words

assertions.name: max_2_cloze_per_card
assertions.description: No more than 2 cloze deletions per card

assertions.name: no_trivial_cloze
assertions.description: Cloze should hide discriminating key words, not grammatical fillers
assertions.check: no cloze hides single stop words (not, is, the, a)

assertions.name: standalone_subject
assertions.description: Every card includes its subject and can be understood without context
assertions.check: each card names the disease or finding it refers to

assertions.name: coverage_key_facts
assertions.description: Covers modality, necrosis definition, APFC timeline, complications
assertions.check: covers CT modality, necrosis definition, APFC 4-week rule, infected necrosis, pseudoaneurysm, venous thrombosis
